meta.title: Immigration After Executive Action: A Symposium on Reform
meta.description: Hudson Institute’s John Fonte joined Michael Barone of the American Enterprise Institute, Mark Krikorian of the Center for Immigration Studies, Andrew C. McCarthy of the National Review Institute, Alex Nowrasteh of Cato Institute, and George F. Will of the Washington Post to discuss the many facets of immigration reform. - Captured Live on Ustream at http://www.ustream.tv/channel/hudson-institute
